prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等 专业社会热度持续偏高，人大统计学类（A+）、计算机类（图灵班）等理科招生专业契合热门方向；本省2026年物理类考生约32.9万人，较2025年（28.5万）增加约15.6%，竞争 显著加剧；中国人民大学位于北京，非本省高校，无本地倾斜；该校在四川招生计划近年持续缩减，2026年虽持平但总量较小， 地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、本省物理类考生大幅增加（+15.6%）、学校声誉偏负面但学科实力顶尖等因素，在 2025年基准747名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约762名，区间675–849名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (formerly Science) was approximately 981 → 680 → 1250 → 747, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, it moved forward notably, then fell back sharply in 2024, and rebounded to about 747 in 2025. The overall trend in the last two years is moving forward, with a baseline of about 747 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan Province for Physics Category was 36 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 24 in 2025, showing a year-on-year reduction. The 2026 plan is 24, the same as 2025, pausing the reduction trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 17th, firmly in the national top tier, with a stable and slightly rising trend in recent years (from 18th in 2021 to 17th in 2026). In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to incidents involving teacher ethics, but in 2025, the evaluation was neutral/mixed (including positive signals from A++ discipline honors). Its Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with above-average attention on short video platforms. No obvious records of admission cut-off breaks. It has 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Statistics, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature, Marxist Theory, Applied Economics) and 6 A/A- disciplines, making it a national top in humanities and social sciences. Statistics, Computer Science and Technology, and other science-related disciplines are also A/A+.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. Renmin University's Statistics (A+), Computer Science (Turing Class), and other science-related majors align with popular directions. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is about 329,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (285,000), significantly intensifying competition. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in this province, so there is no local preference. Its enrollment plan in Sichuan has been continuously reduced in recent years, and although it remains flat in 2026, the total is small, limiting the impact of regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuations in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan being the same as 2025, a significant increase in local Physics Category examinees (+15.6%), a somewhat negative university reputation but top-tier discipline strength, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 747. The predicted minimum ranking is about 762, with a range of 675–849.

- Science Experimental Class (Finance and Mathematics Innovative Talent Class)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 675–849, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 675), prioritize Tier 1 majors such as Artificial Intelligence, Statistics Top Talent Class, and Law. If the ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., around 849), focus on Tier 3 majors while considering Tier 2. Renmin University's science majors are few but refined, with small ranking gaps between tiers. It is advisable to make decisions based on personal interests and discipline evaluation levels.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group (originally liberal arts → history category) was approximately 121 → 117 → 109 → 136. It moved forward year by year from 2022 to 2024, but significantly shifted backward to about 136 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 15 positions over the past 3 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 136. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Sichuan Province was 32 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 43 in 2025 (history category), with a significant expansion in 2025. The 2026 plan is 45, an increase of 2 (+4.7%) compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the top tier nationally, and leading in humanities and social sciences. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, but the 2025 evaluation is neutral/mixed (including positive signals from A++ discipline honors). Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively popular), with above-average attention on short video platforms. No obvious records of admission cut-off breaks. It has 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Statistics, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature, Marxist Theory, Applied Economics), ranking first nationally in humanities and social sciences, highly matching the liberal arts group enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Renmin University's flagship majors such as Law, Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics remains consistently high. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in this province is approximately 206,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (178,000), significantly intensifying competition. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in this province, so there is no local preference. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Sichuan has expanded consecutively from 2025 to 2026, reflecting its emphasis on Sichuan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in historical rankings after 2025, the slight expansion in the 2026 plan (+4.7%), the significant increase in history category examinees in this province (+15.6%), and the somewhat negative reputation but top-tier disciplinary strength, the expansion effect partially offsets the competitive pressure from the increase in examinees. However, the growth rate of examinees far exceeds the expansion rate, so competition is expected to slightly intensify. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 145, with a range of 128–162.
